title: Factor Ferrets
short_description: Cheeky ferrets pop out of their burrows carrying numbers. Catch every one that fits the rule — multiples, then factors, then primes — and leave the impostors underground.
description: A field of burrows, a bunch of ferrets, and each one is carrying a number. Read the rule at the top — 'catch every multiple of 5', 'catch every factor of 24', 'catch every prime' — then tap only the ferrets whose number fits, and hit Done. Miss a good one or grab an impostor and you lose points, so it's real number sense: skip-counting and multiples in the early band, factors of a target in the middle, and spotting prime numbers at the top. Grade bands ramp from multiples of small numbers, to factors of numbers up to 24, to primes and factors up to 48. Clean catches and streaks earn bonus points. A free online factors, multiples and primes game for kids in grades 1–5, feeding your score and GP on OnlyGrins.
controls: Mouse / tap the ferrets whose number fits the rule, then tap Done.
